author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes:
v2.4.2
- Fixed Battery Trends page showing 0% devices as 100% (Groovy truthy-check bug on zero value)
- Fixed drain adjustment for locks, sensors, and smoke detectors never firing (getData().deviceType always returned empty - now uses device.name/typeName)
- Locks, motion sensors, and smoke detectors now correctly apply 50% drain reduction before threshold comparison
- Added Reset Drain History feature on Battery Trends page
- Reset clears samples and drain rate for selected devices without logging a battery replacement
- Reset never runs automatically - only on explicit user action
- Added Reset Drain History documentation to App Guide & Reference info page
- Updated Tips for Best Results with Reset Drain History guidance
